title: Sanctuary Essentials
description: A lightweight modpack designed for Sylven's Sanctuary SMP!
body:
![Sanctuary Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4219abd570e21b49c547f0e7e4b20dc76ec4f1bf.png)
The Sanctuary Modpack is a lightweight SMP modpack built for community-driven survival on Sanctuary SMP. Designed to stay close to vanilla while adding QoL tweaks, light exploration, and social enhancements, it keeps performance smooth without overwhelming players. Perfect for cozy adventures, group builds, and friendly exploration, Sanctuary creates a balanced space where players can connect, thrive, and make lasting memories together on Sanctuary SMP.
